creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: tijl
Date: Tue Dec  3 15:05:17 2013
New Revision: 335572
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/335572

Log:
  There's a warning during boot if the skkserv_enable rc variable is
  undefined so set it to "NO" by default.
  
  PR:		ports/181729
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (3 months)

Modified:
  head/japanese/skkserv/Makefile
  head/japanese/skkserv/files/skkserv.in

Modified: head/japanese/skkserv/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/japanese/skkserv/Makefile	Tue Dec  3 14:52:52 2013	(r335571)
+++ head/japanese/skkserv/Makefile	Tue Dec  3 15:05:17 2013	(r335572)
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	skkserv
 PORTVERSION=	9.6
-PORTREVISION=	5
+PORTREVISION=	6
 CATEGORIES=	japanese
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_PORTS_JP}
 DISTNAME=	skk${PORTVERSION}

Modified: head/japanese/skkserv/files/skkserv.in
==============================================================================
--- head/japanese/skkserv/files/skkserv.in	Tue Dec  3 14:52:52 2013	(r335571)
+++ head/japanese/skkserv/files/skkserv.in	Tue Dec  3 15:05:17 2013	(r335572)
@@ -12,6 +12,7 @@ name=skkserv
 rcvar=skkserv_enable
 command=%%PREFIX%%/sbin/skkserv
 
+: ${skkserv_enable:="NO"}
 : ${skkserv_flags:="-a 127.0.0.1 -u skkserv"}
 
 load_rc_config ${name}
_______________________________________________
